nasb.text: Diligently help Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their way so that nothing is lacking for them.

esv.text: Do your best to speed Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their way; see that they lack nothing.

cnv.text: 你要盡力資助西納律師和亞波羅的旅程，使他們不致缺乏。

ccb.text: 你要为西纳律师和亚波罗送行，尽力帮助他们，让他们路上一无所缺。

csbs.text: 你要尽快送齐纳斯律师和阿波罗上路，好让他们一无所缺。
